markets.no_sub_title: Pierre-Yves Bournazel
markets.rules_primary: If Pierre-Yves Bournazel is announced to qualify for the runoff in the 2026 Paris mayoral election, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
If a candidate wins the first round outright with a majority (or whatever threshold Paris requires to avoid a runoff), and no runoff occurs, the market for that winning candidate will resolve Yes and all other markets will resolve to No.

A candidate is "announced to qualify" when the official election authority of Paris certifies or announces qualification, OR when the Associated Press or at least two other Source Agencies report that Pierre-Yves Bournazel has qualified for the runoff, whichever occurs first. Official certification is not required for resolution.

This is determined at the time qualification is announced; subsequent withdrawals, disqualifications, or changes in eligibility do not affect whether the candidate qualified. If a candidate is announced to not qualify, the market will immediately resolve to No.
markets.title: Will Pierre-Yves Bournazel qualify for the runoff in the 2026 Paris mayoral election?

markets.no_sub_title: Sophia Chikirou
markets.rules_primary: If Sophia Chikirou is announced to qualify for the runoff in the 2026 Paris mayoral election, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
If a candidate wins the first round outright with a majority (or whatever threshold Paris requires to avoid a runoff), and no runoff occurs, the market for that winning candidate will resolve Yes and all other markets will resolve to No.

A candidate is "announced to qualify" when the official election authority of Paris certifies or announces qualification, OR when the Associated Press or at least two other Source Agencies report that Sophia Chikirou has qualified for the runoff, whichever occurs first. Official certification is not required for resolution.

This is determined at the time qualification is announced; subsequent withdrawals, disqualifications, or changes in eligibility do not affect whether the candidate qualified. If a candidate is announced to not qualify, the market will immediately resolve to No.
markets.title: Will Sophia Chikirou qualify for the runoff in the 2026 Paris mayoral election?
